main.description: Register a new group. Creates a group account on the group PDS, generates an app password for the service, and seeds the caller as owner.

handle.description: Short name for the group (e.g. 'mygroup'). Will be combined with the PDS hostname to form the full handle.
Full handle assigned to the group account

accountPassword.description: Primary password for the group account. The owner must save this for credible exit.
